title: Navigating the Menopause Maze
caption: Ever felt lost in your menopause journey?
layout: A cycle diagram showing the stages of menopause: Perimenopause, Menopause, Postmenopause, and Beyond. Each stage includes key symptoms, emotional changes, and intimacy impacts with visuals symbolising each phase.

title: Rediscovering Your Sexuality
caption: Have you redefined your sexual self after 40?
layout: A 4-stage progression infographic depicting: 1. Self-Discovery, 2. Overcoming Societal Norms, 3. Embracing Change, 4. Celebrating Sexual Liberation, with visuals representing growth and empowerment.

title: The Love Languages of Midlife Friendship
caption: What does friendship mean to you now?
layout: A 2x2 grid comparing Emotional Support, Shared Activities, Communication, and Quality Time as love languages, with icons and examples for each category that resonate with midlife themes.

title: Balancing Pleasure & Responsibility
caption: Do you juggle your desires with your duties?
layout: Two-column comparison showing Pleasure on one side (self-care, spontaneity, exploration) and Responsibility on the other (work, family, obligations), with suggestions to integrate both.

title: Flirting After 40: It's Never Too Late
caption: Do you still have that spark?
layout: A playful cycle diagram illustrating steps to reignite flirting: 1. Confidence Boost, 2. Playful Interactions, 3. Compliments & Connection, 4. Building Intimacy, accompanied by fun graphics.

title: Conflict Resolution Styles
caption: How do you handle disagreements?
layout: A 2x2 grid featuring Passive, Aggressive, Assertive, and Passive-Aggressive styles, each with descriptions, pros, and cons, alongside relatable visuals that depict real-life scenarios.

title: Sensual Self-Care Rituals
caption: What’s your go-to self-care ritual?
layout: A progression infographic split into steps for a self-care ritual: 1. Set the Scene, 2. Engage the Senses, 3. Practice Mindfulness, 4. Reflect on Your Experience, with illustrations for each step.

title: Embracing Your Body: Changes at Midlife
caption: How have you accepted your body’s changes?
layout: A two-column comparison of Body Positivity and Body Negativity, illustrating the mental and emotional impact of each mindset alongside encouraging quotes and affirmations.

title: What Intimacy Means to You Now
caption: Has your view of intimacy changed?
layout: A cycle diagram highlighting the evolution of intimacy, with stages including Comfort, Vulnerability, Connection, and Exploration, each depicted with expressive visuals showing emotional depth.

title: Let’s Talk About Orgasm
caption: Are you satisfied with your intimate experiences?
layout: A 4-stage infographic illustrating the stages of reaching orgasm: Arousal, Plateau, Orgasm, and Resolution, with insights and tips for each stage to enhance pleasure.

title: When to Reassess Your Relationship
caption: Is it time for a relationship check-up?
layout: A flowchart guiding questions for recognising relationship health, with branches leading to scenarios: Healthy, Needs Attention, or Toxic, each with advice on next steps.

title: Reclaiming Your Sexual Narrative
caption: Who tells your sexual story?
layout: A two-column comparison of Societal Narratives vs Personal Narratives, with visuals representing the impact of each on self-esteem, intimacy, and relationships, encouraging personal storytelling.

title: Red Flags vs Green Flags in Dating
caption: Are you noticing the signs?
layout: A 2x2 grid showcasing Red Flags (manipulation, lack of respect) against Green Flags (support, open communication) with real-life examples and tips for spotting them early.

title: Mindful Communication in Relationships
caption: Are you truly listening to your partner?
layout: A cycle diagram outlining steps for mindful communication: 1. Active Listening, 2. Reflective Responses, 3. Empathy, 4. Solutions, embellished with encouraging quotes.

title: Emotional Labour in Relationships
caption: Is it one-sided in your partnership?
layout: A two-column comparison highlighting Emotional Labour vs Emotional Support, explaining the responsibilities in each with insightful visuals that illustrate the burden.

title: The Art of Playfulness in Intimacy
caption: When was the last time you laughed together?
layout: A 4-stage progression showcasing the journey from Seriousness to Playfulness in intimacy: 1. Breaking the Routine, 2. Flirting & Teasing, 3. Fun Activities, 4. Deep Connection.

title: Finding Your Tribe After 40
caption: Have you connected with the right people?
layout: A cyclical infographic featuring stages of finding your tribe: 1. Self-Discovery, 2. Seeking Connection, 3. Building Relationships, 4. Celebrating Community, with vibrant visuals representing social joy.

title: Sexual Wellbeing Beyond 40
caption: What does a healthy sex life look like for you now?
layout: A two-column layout defining Sexual Wellbeing components: Physical, Emotional, and Relational on one side, with Visuals of holistic practices on the other.

title: The Power of Authenticity in Relationships
caption: Are you being your true self?
layout: A flowchart detailing steps to cultivate authenticity, with paths leading to deeper intimacy, improved communication, or distancing based on personal choices illustrated with expressive imagery.

title: The Shift from Mothering to Partnering
caption: How has your role changed in relationships?
layout: A 4-stage progression showing the transition from Responsibility, Authority, Nurturing to Partnership, with visuals that depict the evolution and growth in relationships.

title: Reconnecting with Your Body Through Movement
caption: When was the last time you celebrated your body?
layout: A two-column comparison of Movement styles (Gentle vs Intense) and their emotional impact, with practical examples of activities for each type showcasing joy in movement.

title: The Balancing Act of Self and Partnership
caption: Are you losing yourself in your relationship?
layout: A cycle diagram illustrating the balance between Self-Care, Partnership, Personal Growth, and Shared Goals, including visual reminders to strive for balance in daily life.
